items.title: PTC Inc. (PTC) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
items.description: PTC Inc. (PTC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +34.43% and +10.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

items.title: Why Dividend Investors Should Watch Salesforce’s (CRM) Innovation Edge
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is included among the 11 Innovative Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) was named one of the World’s Most Innovative Companies for 2025 by Fast Company, recognized for its efforts in sustainable AI and for integrating purpose-built AI tools and agents into Slack for employees. As the leading AI-powered CRM, Salesforce […]

items.title: Strong Cloud Subscription Aids PEGA's Prospects: What's More to Come?
items.description: Pegasystems sees strong cloud subscription momentum ahead, driven by AI, AWS ties and legacy system migration.

items.title: What to Expect From Salesforce's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
items.description: Salesforce is gearing up to release its second-quarter results later next month, and analysts are expecting a double-digit growth in earnings.

items.title: NOW's Subscription Growth Picks Up: A Sign of More Upside?
items.description: ServiceNow eyes $12.785B in 2025 subscription sales as AI-fueled product demand lifts long-term growth outlook.
